title: Nazuna Nanakusa
description: A Nazuna Nanakusa themed resource pack with custom GUI, custom totems, and diamond/netherite gear.
body:
Nazuna Nanakusa is a resource pack themed around Nazuna Nanakusa.

  The pack changes the visual style of selected items and UI elements, including custom Nazuna totems, custom
  diamond and netherite tools, weapons and armor, a custom GUI theme, custom bow textures.
